slack.title: Slack
slack.description: Search messages, read channels, and post summaries — the delivery surface for change comms nudges and readiness check-ins.

gmail.title: Gmail
gmail.description: Search and read email threads for stakeholder context, comms drafts, and sponsor follow-ups.

google-drive.title: Google Drive
google-drive.description: Search, read, and fetch change plans, stakeholder maps, and comms packs from Google Drive.

google-calendar.title: Google Calendar
google-calendar.description: Read upcoming town halls, go-live dates, and sponsor checkpoints from Google Calendar.

atlassian.title: Atlassian
atlassian.description: Read Jira issues, Confluence pages, and change artefacts scoped to the user's permissions.

linear.title: Linear
linear.description: Search, read, and update Linear issues, projects, initiatives, and milestones scoped to the user's permissions.

asana.title: Asana
asana.description: Search, read, and update Asana tasks, projects, portfolios, and goals scoped to the user's permissions.

monday.title: Monday.com
monday.description: Search, read, and update monday.com boards, items, columns, and users scoped to the user's permissions.
